_description: Transparent 9:16 overlay layers for vertical video (YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels). All positions respect platform UI safe zones — content never collides with action buttons, captions, headers, or navigation elements.

_slots.headline: optional — primary text. 1–6 words at 76px (50px in lower-third mode).
_slots.subtitle: optional — secondary text below headline. 1–2 short sentences.
_slots.label: optional — short uppercase eyebrow tag above headline.
_slots.position: optional — safe-top (default), safe-bottom, safe-center, safe-left, safe-right. All avoid platform UI overlays.
_slots.lower-third: optional — set to any value (e.g. 'yes') for a lower-third bar above the platform caption zone. Overrides position.
_slots.accent: optional — accent hex color for rules, labels, decorative elements. Vary per layer. Default: #e8b86d
_slots.ink: optional — primary text hex color. Use the SAME value on every layer. Default: #ffffff
_slots.image: optional — small image (logo, avatar, icon) displayed next to text. Rendered as a circle.

title: Short-Form Video Overlays

slides.label: Tip 01
slides.headline: Hook Fast
slides.subtitle: You have 2 seconds before they scroll.
